site.title: Trisha Halder - Content & SEO Writer Portfolio

hero.name: Hi! I am Trisha
hero.subtitle: Content Writer based in Bangalore
hero.description: I help write compelling content with proper keywords so they can rank on Google pages. As a dedicated and versatile content writer with a strong background in English Literature, I bring a rich understanding of language and storytelling to every project. My experience spans academic content, SEO content, blog writing, and website content allowing me to create compelling and optimized materials that engage diverse audiences.

about.heading: About Me
paragraphs: With a strong foundation in English Literature, I specialize in creating content that not only engages readers but also performs exceptionally well in search rankings. My approach combines creative storytelling with strategic SEO implementation.
Currently, I'm looking forward to expanding my expertise in copywriting and content marketing, continuously learning and creating value through every project I undertake.

portfolio.heading: See My Content in Action
portfolio.subheading: A showcase of my content creation across various formats and industries

projects.title: UNICEF Campaign
projects.description: Impactful copywriting for a humanitarian cause, focusing on emotional connection and call-to-action.

detail.intro: Impactful copywriting for a humanitarian cause, focusing on emotional connection and call-to-action.
detail.bodyHtml:
About the project

This is a copywriting project provided by TTT Academy where I had to showcase my skill of writing for a non-profit organization.

Objectives

  1. To write ‘an ad’ that helps raise money for the children of Gaza.
  2. To make a carousel, or a video, or a GIF, or anything else with a strong impact
  3. To increase followers on Instagram, or connections on LinkedIn to donate.

projects.title: Video Content Strategy
projects.description: SEO-optimized video titles, descriptions, and tags to maximize YouTube reach and engagement.

detail.intro: SEO-optimized video titles, descriptions, and tags to maximize YouTube reach and engagement.
detail.bodyHtml:
About the project

As a part of the video assignment in TTT Academy (A Content Writing course I was enrolled to), I have created this video optimization strategy deck for this YouTube video.

The Objectives

  1. To increase visibility
  2. To chane the thumbnail to make it more interesting
  3. To improve the video title and description for a better optimization

projects.title: Email Campaign Content
projects.description: Conversion-focused email marketing campaigns including abandoned cart recovery strategies.

detail.intro: Conversion-focused email marketing campaigns including abandoned cart recovery strategies.
detail.bodyHtml:
About the project

This was a Digital Marketing assignment at TTT Academy which I have successfully completed.

The Objectives

  1. To create a 3-step email marketing sequence for an abandoned cart for TTT Academy.
  2. To Identify the stages of the funnel for the email sequences.

projects.title: Instagram Content Strategy
projects.description: Engaging social media content and marketing strategies for Instagram Reels and posts.

detail.intro: Engaging social media content and marketing strategies for Instagram Reels and posts.
detail.bodyHtml:
About the project

Another assignment I have completed for a Digital Marketing masterclass at TTT Academy. Here I was able to show my expertise in creating promotional video content. I have created an Instagram reel advertisement to promote the service of Audible.

The Objective

For one stage of the funnel (awareness, consideration, conversion, and retargeting), creating paid ads for Audible on one platform of choice

projects.title: Topical Marketing Content
projects.description: Strategic marketing campaign content leveraging current trends and topical relevance.

detail.intro: Strategic marketing campaign content leveraging current trends and topical relevance.
detail.bodyHtml:
About the project

This was an assignment at TTT Academy that enabled me to showcase my expertise on Topical Marketing Campaigns.

The Objective

To Identify a trend from Twitter and ideate a social media topical campaign for Airbnb using two or more of the following: tastemakers, unexpectedness and communities of participation.

projects.title: Content Strategy Presentation
projects.description: Comprehensive content strategy and marketing plan with detailed implementation roadmap.

detail.intro: Comprehensive content strategy and marketing plan with detailed implementation roadmap.
detail.bodyHtml:
About the project

This assignment at TTT Academy allowed me to showcase my understanding of the content strategy of popular brands. I have chosen Starbucks for this project to highlight their changing strategies for the Indian market.

The Objective

  1. To find 1 brand that has changed strategy to adapt to their new market and research what steps they took to reflect their changed positioning
  2. To Make it into a 10-slide deck.

projects.title: Medical and Healthcare Blog
projects.description: An informative healthcare article explaining the causes, symptoms, risks, treatment, and prevention of preterm birth for expecting parents.

detail.intro: An informative healthcare article explaining the causes, symptoms, risks, treatment, and prevention of preterm birth for expecting parents.
detail.bodyHtml:
This project involved creating an informative healthcare article on preterm birth, aimed at educating expecting parents about its causes, warning signs, complications, and preventive measures. The content was carefully structured to simplify complex medical information while maintaining accuracy, making it accessible and actionable for a general audience.

The complete, published article is available at the link below.

projects.title: Doctor Video
projects.description: An informative healthcare video highlighting varicocele embolization as a safe, non-surgical solution for male infertility

detail.intro: An informative healthcare video highlighting varicocele embolization as a safe, non-surgical solution for male infertility.
detail.bodyHtml: This project involved scripting and optimizing content for an educational healthcare video focused on varicocele and its impact on male fertility. The objective was to translate complex medical concepts into clear, patient-friendly language while highlighting varicocele embolization as a safe and minimally invasive treatment option. The content was designed to improve awareness, engagement, and understanding among a broad audience.
